notes: Initial canonical instance seeded from the HY-IG v2 reference pair (per META-RPD) after Wave 4B cross-review exposed the method-to-chart mapping living in three SOPs (Evan ECON-H4, Vera VIZ-A3, Ace render_method_block). Populated from handoff_to_vera_20260419.md, VIZ-A3 Standard Chart Set, META-ZI episode slugs, and the Strategy-page chart inventory. Producer (Vera) validates a chart's basename against canonical_filename_pattern before save; consumer (Ace) uses method_name to resolve both the chart JSON and the upstream CSV. Evan's ECON-H4 handoff is the INPUT that feeds this registry; this registry is the authoritative OUTPUT (VIZ-V8).

correlation.notes: Pearson/Spearman/Kendall/distance across 1d/5d/21d/63d/252d horizons; RdBu_r zmid=0; top 6-8 signals by |corr| at 63d.

granger.notes: S18-11: standalone F-statistic-by-lag bar chart with α=0.05 F-critical line. MUST NOT fall back to local_projections.json — that was the Wave 1.5 silent-fallback bug this registry exists to prevent.

ccf.notes: Pre-whitened CCF (lags -20 to +20) with 95% CI bands; significant bars highlighted.

local_projections.notes: Jordà IRF coefficient plot (h=0..24), shaded CI band, significance stars. DISTINCT from granger — do not conflate.

regime.notes: HMM stress-probability timeline with regime shading. Column-name discipline per Defense 1: stress_prob / calm_prob, never state_0/state_1.

quantile.notes: Quantile coefficient plot across τ ∈ {0.05, 0.10, 0.25, 0.50, 0.75, 0.90, 0.95} with shaded CI and zero line.

transfer_entropy.notes: Directional TE bars (indicator→target vs reverse) with permutation p-values annotated.

quartile_returns.notes: S18-8: Q1–Q4 annualized return bars colored by sign with diverging palette; companion to CCF and regime blocks. Do not drop silently on reruns.

history_zoom_dotcom.notes: META-ZI (refined Wave 6B 2026-04-19 per META-AL): per-pair dual-panel rendered chart at output/charts/{pair_id}/plotly/history_zoom_dotcom.json. Canonical layer is metadata only — docs/schemas/history_zoom_events_registry.json (VIZ-V12) carries events/dates/citations. No output/_comparison/ fallback; missing chart → GATE-25 placeholder. SCHEMA-REQUEST: override_supported semantics now refer to the *legacy* META-ZI model — Vera to revisit field meaning in next schema version.

history_zoom_gfc.notes: META-ZI (refined Wave 6B per META-AL): per-pair dual-panel rendered chart at output/charts/{pair_id}/plotly/history_zoom_gfc.json. Events (Aug 2007 BNP fund freeze, Sep 2008 Lehman, Mar 2009 trough) sourced from VIZ-V12 events registry. No _comparison/ fallback.

history_zoom_covid.notes: META-ZI (refined Wave 6B per META-AL): per-pair dual-panel rendered chart at output/charts/{pair_id}/plotly/history_zoom_covid.json. Events (Feb 2020 WHO declaration, Mar 2020 SPX trough, Mar 2020 Fed facility launch) sourced from VIZ-V12 events registry. No _comparison/ fallback.

history_zoom_taper_2018.notes: META-ZI (refined Wave 6B per META-AL): per-pair dual-panel rendered chart at output/charts/{pair_id}/plotly/history_zoom_taper_2018.json. Events sourced from VIZ-V12 events registry slug 'taper_2018'.

history_zoom_inflation_2022.notes: META-ZI (refined Wave 6B per META-AL): per-pair dual-panel rendered chart at output/charts/{pair_id}/plotly/history_zoom_inflation_2022.json. Events sourced from VIZ-V12 events registry slug 'inflation_2022'.

hero.notes: Dual-axis indicator (red, left) and target (blue, right) with NBER recession shading per VIZ-V2 rev 2026-04-19 (alpha 0.20-0.28, rgba(150,120,120,0.22)). Subplot rule: one shape per xaxis per recession. Mandatory perceptual-check PNG sidecar.

equity_curves.notes: Top strategies + B&H; legend in final-value descending order; OOS period only; log-scale optional.

equity_drawdown.notes: Drawdown-from-peak shaded area for winner vs B&H; Y inverted so deeper drawdown reads as lower, per VIZ-A1.

tournament_scatter.notes: OOS Sharpe vs turnover per combo; X = turnover, Y = Sharpe; color = max DD; stars = top 5; diamond = B&H.

trade_log_preview.notes: APP-CH1 non-method entry (added Wave 5B-2). Mini cumulative-PnL line with BUY/REDUCE markers at signal-crossing dates, sourced from the broker-style trade log. Paired with the first-N-rows trade-log table preview on the Strategy page (row count governed by APP-AF5 extension; default N=10).

signal_timeseries.notes: APP-CH1 non-method entry (added Wave 5B-2). Primary signal column time-series (per winner_summary.signal_column, APP-WS1) with decision-threshold dashed line and NBER shading when span > 5yr. Produced by the Probability Engine Panel (APP-SE1) as a standalone exportable JSON for Ace's loader; the in-page rendering path also reads from `signals_{date}.parquet` directly.

position_timeseries.notes: APP-CH1 non-method entry (added Wave 5B-2). Resulting 0-100% equity exposure derived from signal x strategy_family rules (P1_long_cash / P2_signal_strength / P3_long_short), rendered by the Position Adjustment Panel (APP-SE2). Companion to signal_timeseries; color encoding uses buy/hold/sell_indicator roles from VIZ-V11 color_palette_registry.

regime_shading_backdrop.notes: APP-CH1 non-method entry (added Wave 5B-2). Story-page hero-chart companion showing HMM stress/calm regime bands as a full-width backdrop (distinct from the probabilistic hmm_regime_probs chart on Evidence which uses an area-probability encoding). Exists to give the Story hero a simple regime backdrop without re-deriving HMM state labels at render-time.
